actions.name: 业务询价
actions.expression:
select
  khxj.rid,xj_dh 
from khxj where khxj.xj_dh  = [消息查看.报价单号]
group by rid,xj_dh 
order by min(khxj.xj_dh)
actions.caption: 业务询价

actions.name: 采购报价
actions.expression:
select
  cgbj.rid 
from cgbj
  where cgbj.bj_id = [消息查看.报价单号]
group by cgbj.bj_id 
order by min(cgbj.bj_id)
actions.caption: 采购报价

view.params:
SELECT cdzl.SID,cdzl.cdmc
FROM cdzl
WHERE   (cdzl.cdmc like "%"+ :cdmc  +"%")
ORDER BY cdzl.SID ASC

SELECT cymx.fphm,cymx.SID
FROM cymx
WHERE   ((:qxjb1=2) OR ((:qxjb1 =0) AND (cymx.sys_owner=:c_user)) OR ((:qxjb1 =1) AND (cymx.sys_path like :c_depart)))
ORDER BY cymx.SID ASC
